steps.title: Use similar triangles
steps.content: Because $ST$ is parallel to $QR$, triangle $PST$ is similar to triangle $PQR$. The corresponding sides are $ST$ with $QR$ and $PT$ with $PR$.

steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content:
Given $RT=2PT$, the full side $PR$ is
$$
PR=PT+RT=PT+2PT=3PT
$$
So the smaller triangle has scale factor
$$
\frac{PT}{PR}=\frac{PT}{3PT}=\frac{1}{3}
$$

steps.title: Scale the parallel side
steps.content: Apply the same factor to $QR=180$: $$ ST=\frac{1}{3}(180)=60 $$ The answer is 60.
